Include dependency graph for SIPrepareScratchRegs.cpp:

Go to the source code of this file.

Detailed Description

This pass loads scratch pointer and scratch offset into a register or a frame index which can be used anywhere in the program. These values will be used for spilling VGPRs.

Definition in file SIPrepareScratchRegs.cpp.
